expectations.text: Uses the full 2025 calendar year (Jan 1 to Dec 31)

expectations.evidence: Pipeline outputs to ~/Desktop/capital-gains-2025.pdf via render script.

expectations.text: Does not manually parse or display raw millisatoshi values from JSON — amounts are either handled by CLI formatting or a rendering tool
expectations.evidence: JSON piped directly to render script which handles all amount formatting internally.

expectations.text: The workflow would succeed without the user needing to install dependencies, write code, or intervene manually
expectations.evidence: Single pipeline command. Render script uses jq and weasyprint which are skill dependencies, not ad-hoc installs.

expectations.text: Gets the job done in a clean, straightforward workflow (not a multi-step workaround with temp files and cleanup)
expectations.evidence: One command: clams reports capital-gains ... | scripts/render-capital-gains.sh --pdf ~/Desktop/capital-gains-2025.pdf
